constraints.ocl:
context Firmware
inv: self.devices->size() >= 2 and self.devices->size() <= 2

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.roles->notEmpty() implies self.roles->sortedBy(x | x.roleName)->first().roleName <= self.roles->sortedBy(x | x.roleName)->last().roleName

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.description.size() >= 10 implies self.description.substring(1, 10) = 'value'

context DataStream
inv: self.alertRules->notEmpty() implies self.alertRules->sortedBy(x | x.condition)->first().condition <= self.alertRules->sortedBy(x | x.condition)->last().condition

context Device
inv: self.tickets->notEmpty() implies self.tickets->sortedBy(x | x.ticketId)->first().ticketId <= self.tickets->sortedBy(x | x.ticketId)->last().ticketId

context Firmware
inv: self.devices->size() >= 4 implies self.devices->asSequence()->at(4).deviceId <> null

context Location
inv: self.site <> '' and self.site.size() > 0

context Device
inv: self.dataStreams->forAll(x, y | x <> y implies x.topic <> y.topic)

context IoTPlatform
inv: self.networks->notEmpty() implies self.networks->last().networkId <> null

context APIKey
inv: self.value <> '' and self.value.size() > 0

context Role
inv: self.policies->notEmpty() implies self.policies->sortedBy(x | x.rulesJson)->first().rulesJson <= self.policies->sortedBy(x | x.rulesJson)->last().rulesJson

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.roles->notEmpty() implies self.roles->last().roleName <> null
